executives.name: Anne Giardini
executives.background: Ms. Giardini is a lawyer and executive with over 30 years of experience in the resource sector. She was previously President of Weyerhaeuser Company Limited and serves on several boards.

executives.name: Susan Wolburgh Jenah
executives.background: Ms. Wolburgh Jenah is the former President and CEO of the Investment Industry Regulatory Organization of Canada (IIROC). She serves on several boards and is a member of the Order of Canada.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Interim Chair of the Board as of March 2025)
